'''''VTR-LX''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] that served as a prisoner transport during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In addition to transporting prisoners of war captured during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], the ship was used as bait by the Empire in their bid to place an Imperial [[Kupalo|operative]] high up in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] chain of command.

She was first seen near ''[[Calast]]'' by Alliance [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] from the [[Defiance Task Force]] but soon escaped near an Imperial penal facility, ''[[Bundil II]]''. She was followed and disabled by Y-wings, and destroyed by a bomb planted by Alliance commando team [[Storm Unit (team)|Storm Unit]] once all prisoners had been rescued.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
